article.title: Uber frontend interview India
article.content:
Hi,
Anyone attending frontend drive this or next week ?
Which kind of questions are getting asked in phone screening and specialization rounds ?

post.content: Hey, did you give the interview? What kind of questions were asked?
I was asked for my availability for this week but no communication after that\nreached out to recruiter but no response \ndid you attend ?
How did you apply for this drive
Hi, can we connect? https://www.linkedin.com/in/vaishnavdixitiitdhanbad/ I gave interviews for Google and I can help with the questions, and we can also discuss how to apply for Uber.
